title: litosanthes micrantha
intro: Litosanthes micrantha, also known as the small-flowered litosanthes, is a plant species of the family Asteraceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Litosanthes micrantha is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
